ogTitle: Coomealla vs Coomoo Coomoo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coomealla and Coomoo Coomoo.
heading: Coomealla vs Coomoo Coomoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coomealla, New South Wales and Coomoo Coomoo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coomoo Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Coomealla (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coomealla or Coomoo Coomoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coomealla has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Coomoo Coomoo scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coomealla scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Coomoo Coomoo scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coomealla or Coomoo Coomoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coomoo Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
